description_long: This is a modern bungalow enclosed by a low stone wall, featuring a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The structure includes a main two-story section with large floor-to-ceiling windows, a single-story side extension, and a covered carport with a pergola roof. The exterior is predominantly white with dark gray paving, and the property is landscaped with a few tall palm trees. The front area includes a driveway leading to the carport, while the backyard appears to have a patio or outdoor seating area. The overall layout is open and spacious, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor-indoor integration.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a carport, and palm landscaping, enclosed by a stone wall.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main entrance, carport with pergola, and palm trees in the front yard.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the carport from the side, the stone wall enclosure, and the rear extension.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear facade with large windows and the backyard patio area.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the back of the bungalow, showing the single-story extension and rear landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
